strengths: Demonstrates clear understanding of Mishra's knot technique
Shows proper hand positioning and suture manipulation
weaknesses: Video content is instructional rather than demonstrative
Unable to assess timing or precision skills

drills.name: Complete Task Performance
drills.description: Perform the full FLS Task 5 sequence from needle loading through final knot completion with timing.

drills.name: Needle driving angle practice
drills.description: Practice loading the needle at a stable driving angle before entering the Penrose drain with 10 repetitions.
drills.targets_weakness: Unable to assess timing or precision skills.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on transitioning from understanding the technique to executing complete task performances under time pressure. Practice the full sequence to build muscle memory and improve completion times.
